sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111604" key="filo/xwros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλόχωρ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111604.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of a place,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:167" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.167</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
